backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Client, Intervention, UserProfile, MediaItem) and CRUD methods for clients, interventions, user profiles, and technical folders, with role-based access control via Auth mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two blank-screen/auth-initialization bug fixes to their relevant frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PWA with French locale, viewport/theme-color meta tags, manifest and icon links, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/public/manifest.webmanifest: PWA web manifest for 'Vial Traite Service' defining app name, icons, display mode, theme color, and version.
frontend/public/sw.js: Service worker that caches PWA assets on install, serves non-navigation requests from cache with network fallback, and cleans up old caches on activate.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with authenticated/unauthenticated routes, QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and an AuthenticatedLayout guard that shows a loading screen until Internet Identity finishes initializing before redirecting.
frontend/src/components/admin/AdminUnloc: Empty file placeholder for the AdminUnlockDialog component.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter their name for profile setup, blocking dismissal until a name is submitted.
frontend/src/components/blacklist/Blackl: Displays a panel for managing a client's blacklist status, allowing users to mark or unmark a client as blacklisted with optional comments and media attachments.
frontend/src/components/clients/CreateCl: A dialog form for creating a new client with fields for name, address, phone, and email, using the useCreateClient hook to persist the data.
frontend/src/components/clients/EditClie: A dialog form pre-populated with an existing client's data, allowing users to edit and save client information via the useUpdateClient hook.
A wrapper around the Badge UI component that adds custom color variants for 'success', 'warning', and 'pending' states.
frontend/src/components/common/ErrorBoun: A React class-based error boundary that catches runtime errors and displays a styled error card with options to retry, reload, or copy error details to the clipboard.
frontend/src/components/export/ExportDat: A dialog that lets users choose between JSON and PDF export formats and triggers a data export with a progress indicator via the useDataExport hook.
frontend/src/components/guards/Authentic: A route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and shows a loading spinner while authentication state is being initialized.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ad: A dialog component for creating a new intervention, with date fields (day/month/year), a comments textarea, and a media picker, using the useAddIntervention hook to submit.
frontend/src/components/interventions/Ed: A dialog component for editing an existing intervention, pre-populating fields from the provided intervention object and submitting updates via the useUpdateIntervention hook.
frontend/src/components/interventions/In: A read-only dialog displaying intervention details (date, employee, comments, media) with an optional edit button that opens the EditInterventionDialog.
Displays a list of interventions for a given client with add, edit, delete, and view actions, using loading/error states and confirmation dialogs for deletion.
frontend/src/components/layout/MobileLay: A mobile app shell with a sticky header (logo, user name, logout), a scrollable main content area, and a fixed bottom navigation bar with links to Clients, Dashboard, and Technical Folder.
frontend/src/components/media/FilePicker: A button component that programmatically opens a file input dialog and returns the selected files via an onSelect callback.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPicke: A media management component that allows users to add media via file upload or camera capture and displays thumbnails with remove buttons for each added item.
frontend/src/components/media/MediaPrevi: Renders a grid of image thumbnails from ExternalBlob objects, with optional click-to-open support using a DocumentViewer dialog for full-size viewing.
frontend/src/components/sync/Connectivit: Displays a status bar indicating offline state or pending sync operations, with a button to manually trigger synchronization when online.
frontend/src/components/technical-folder: Dialog form for creating a new folder at a given path, validating the name and calling the useCreateFolder mutation on submit.
Modal viewer for files (images, PDFs, videos) with zoom, rotation, fullscreen, pinch-to-zoom, and download controls.
Returns an appropriate Lucide icon component based on a file's extension (image, PDF, video, document, spreadsheet, or generic file).
Dialog for moving a file to a different folder, providing breadcrumb navigation through the existing folder structure and confirming the move via useMoveTechnicalFile.
Dialog form for renaming a folder, validating the new name and calling the useRenameFolder mutation on submit.
Row component for a technical file entry with actions to view (DocumentViewer), move (MoveFolderDialog), and delete (with confirmation dialog) the file.
A dialog component for uploading files to a technical folder, supporting both file selection and camera capture with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance, using the current Internet Identity for authentication and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminUnlock.ts: An empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useBlacklist.ts: Provides two mutation hooks for marking and unmarking clients as blacklisted via the backend actor, with cache invalidation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useClients.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching all clients, fetching a single client by ID, creating a client, and updating a client via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Provides hooks for fetching and saving the current caller's user profile via the backend actor, with toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useDataExport.ts: A hook that fetches all clients, interventions, and technical files from the backend and exports the aggregated data as a JSON or plain-text file download.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and identity state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useInterventions.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting client interventions via the backend actor, with cache invalidation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useOnlineStatus.ts: A simple hook that tracks and returns the browser's online/offline status by listening to window network events.
frontend/src/hooks/useSync.ts: Custom React hook that tracks online status and pending sync count, triggering a sync operation automatically when the device comes back online with pending items.
frontend/src/hooks/useTechnicalFolder.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for managing technical folder files, providing list, upload, delete, move, create folder, and rename folder operations against the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the Vial Traite Service brand color theme in both light and dark modes, plus safe-area utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility module exporting a single `cn` helper that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/offline/db.ts: IndexedDB wrapper for the ClientDossiersDB database, providing functions to manage an outbox store for pending operations and a cache store for offline data.
frontend/src/offline/outbox.ts: Separate IndexedDB-backed outbox implementation for queuing, retrieving, and removing offline operations with a timestamp index.
frontend/src/offline/syncEngine.ts: Sync engine that reads queued offline operations and replays them against the backend actor, removing each operation after successful execution and handling unauthorized errors gracefully.
frontend/src/pages/ClientDossierPage.tsx: Page component displaying a single client's full dossier including contact info, blacklist status, intervention list, and an edit dialog, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/ClientsPage.tsx: Page component listing all clients with search filtering, navigation to individual dossiers, blacklist badges, and a dialog to create new clients.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page displaying a calendar and a list of interventions for the selected date, with loading/error states and a details dialog on item click.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, showing a loading spinner during initialization and redirecting to the home route once authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicalFolderPage.t: Technical folder page that builds and navigates a hierarchical file/folder tree from flat file paths, supporting upload, folder creation, and renaming via dialogs.
frontend/src/pwa/registerServiceWorker.t: Registers the PWA service worker (/sw.js) after a 1-second delay on page load, with basic error logging.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them in sessionStorage, and removing them from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom OKLCH-based color tokens, border radius variables, font stack, and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Vial Traite Service' tracking known issues (blank white screen on startup) and existing fix features related to authentication initialization.
